# OpenAI Node.js SDK Releases

## Latest Releases (March 2026)

**v6.33.0** (March 25, 2026)
- "add keys field to computer action types" - expanded input options for computer automation
- WebSocket async iterator and stream() support added for improved real-time communication handling
- Aligned SDK response types with expanded item schemas
- Made type required in ResponseInputMessageItem

**v6.32.0** (March 17, 2026)
- "5.4 nano and mini model slugs" added to the API

**v6.31.0** (March 16, 2026)
- "add in/nin filter types to ComparisonFilter"

**v6.30.1** (March 16, 2026)
- Internal CI branch adjustments

**v6.30.0** (March 16, 2026)
- Added /v1/videos endpoint option to batches
- Introduced defer_loading field to NamespaceTool
- Fixed OIDC publishing for npm

**v6.29.0** (March 13, 2026)
- Custom voices functionality implemented

**v6.28.0** (March 13, 2026)
- Sora API enhancements including character API, video extensions/edits, and higher resolution exports
- Removed detail field from ResponseInputFile and ResponseInputFileContent types

**v6.27.0** (March 5, 2026)
- ComputerTool promoted to general availability; computer_use_preview moved to ComputerUsePreview class

**v6.26.0** (March 5, 2026)
- "gpt-5.4, tool search tool, and new computer tool" released

**v6.25.0** (February 24, 2026)
- Phase field added to message types

**v6.24.0** (February 24, 2026)
- New models gpt-realtime-1.5 and gpt-audio-1.5 added to realtime functionality

Updated: 2026-04-01
